failedAssertions.reason: Route renders 404 UI but returns HTTP 200 instead of 404.
Hidden article content is blocked and excluded from listings, but endpoint does not return required HTTP 404 status.
Related-by-tag results are not displayed on article detail despite existing shared-tag candidates.
Current category breadcrumb segment is not a link, which does not meet the assertion contract wording that each segment be linked.
Observed client-side redirect behavior, but contract requires HTTP 302 redirect response.
documentElement.scrollWidth exceeded viewport width at 768 and 1024, indicating horizontal overflow.
Route targets do not match contract: expected /users/login and /users/register but implementation uses /login and /register.
Authenticated header links do not match contract routing expectations (expected profile + /users/account; actual links point to /admin).
Category dropdown omitted visible category g2core_6a598d_grandchild (cat_id=5).

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked by missing test fixture data: no available article body includes glossary terms, so first-occurrence tooltip behavior cannot be exercised end-to-end on current dataset.
Blocked by shared seeded dataset: could not safely create a no-categories global state without destructive cross-worker impact.
Blocked by shared seeded dataset: could not safely create a no-articles global state without destructive cross-worker impact.
Precondition unmet: available visible data does not exceed pagination threshold.
Precondition unmet: no expired hash fixture available without mutating shared data or waiting >1h.

appliedUpdates.description: Added public-site fixture and isolation learnings (glossary concurrency, empty-state fixtures, search pagination/expiry fixtures, glossary-term article fixture requirements).

frictions.description: Advanced search page has duplicate 'Keywords' labels (main form + sidebar search), causing strict locator conflicts in agent-browser.
frictions.resolution: Switched to element refs from snapshot (filled @e9 and clicked @e31) to target the correct form.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log returned no captured requests in this run.
frictions.resolution: Captured explicit route/asset status codes with curl as supplemental network evidence.

frictions.description: Existing seeded data did not provide enough visible articles in one category to exercise pagination transitions for VAL-BROWSE-003.
frictions.resolution: Created temporary prefixed articles (ut_browse_crosscut_pag_*) for validation, captured evidence, then removed all temporary rows after testing.

frictions.description: agent-browser network export does not include response status codes.
frictions.resolution: Captured supplemental curl evidence for required status codes and payload snippets.

frictions.description: Bulk action dropdown/update controls are hidden until at least one row checkbox is selected.
frictions.resolution: Selected a glossary row first; controls appeared and delete action became available.

frictions.description: Invalid edit route handling is SPA/client-driven (document request returns SPA shell; not an HTTP 302 redirect).
frictions.resolution: Captured final redirected UI state and supplemental API 404 evidence for invalid ID handling.

frictions.description: Glossary data changed during parallel validation (new admin-created term appeared mid-run), so /glossary evidence had to be re-captured to align UI and DB counts at one point in time.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran /glossary capture and DB query immediately afterward; final UI and DB both show 8 terms.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request export returned "No requests captured" during this session, so explicit status/body evidence had to be collected with supplemental curl calls.
frictions.resolution: Captured API request/response evidence with curl for /api/search, /api/categories, /api/settings/public, /api/articles/popular, and /api/articles/recent.

frictions.description: agent-browser label locator for 'Keywords' matched both main search form input and sidebar search input.
frictions.resolution: Switched to ref-based interaction (@e9/@e31) after snapshot to target the intended advanced search form.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log did not capture useful /search request details in this run.
frictions.resolution: Used supplemental curl checks and SQLite evidence for status/behavior validation where needed.

blockers.description: No current article body contains any glossary term, so first-occurrence tooltip behavior cannot be triggered through existing public data.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried glossary terms and all article descriptions in SQLite; found zero matches.

blockers.description: Shared seeded environment did not provide an isolated way to enforce global empty categories/articles preconditions for homepage empty-state assertions.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reviewed current dataset and avoided destructive global data mutation per shared-infrastructure rules.

blockers.description: Pagination precondition not met: site_max_search=20 while maximum visible matched records in dataset were 9.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Ran broad keyword search ('g') and verified DB match count; still below pagination threshold.

blockers.description: No expired search hashes available for expiration-path validation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried search table for rows older than 1 hour; found 0. Avoided mutating shared DB timestamps.
